recommendation: Ratify-strength update to the pending pre-judge mechanical self-check (ledger seq 42, still unratified): the same failure mode it targets — README/spec.md prose asserting behavior (a use-case row, a coverage claim) with no backing .feature scenario — recurred within github-34's own combat log, caught only at the cold spec-judge gate. 2x cause=spec-feature-contradiction and 2x cause=coverage-gap in one mission's log, on top of the seq42 evidence drawn from separate CRs. Recommend the Council prioritize ratifying seq42's pre-judge extension (referenced-artifact-exists + use-case-row-has-scenario checks) given the recurrence now spans multiple independent captures.
evidence: github-34.log.jsonl seq3 (spec-feature-contradiction): plan-retirement suite asserted a caller decision the spec's Non-goals disclaimed as out-of-unit
github-34.log.jsonl seq4 (coverage-gap): plan-retirement suite missing the partial-pair and exact-stem edge scenarios
github-34.log.jsonl seq6 (spec-feature-contradiction): gateway README claimed every scenario maps to a use case; the discover-specs status-scan scenario had no Use Cases row
github-34.log.jsonl seq7 (coverage-gap): gateway prose promised a zero-count strategy boundary with no scenario verifying it
ledger seq 42 (unratified, sdd-scanner): same underlying pattern already flagged from seq30/39/31 evidence — this entry raises the cross-mission recurrence count, not a new pattern

recommendation: Codify a minimum durable-footprint convention for hand-run / reconcile-forward missions (concluded without a live conductor run, so no *.log.jsonl combat log is ever written): at minimum, land one durable ledger line per such mission (e.g. a lightweight gate-adjacent or leash-adjacent record noting the mission concluded, its outcome class, and whether a CR/gate cycle ran) so the doctrine loop's stated PRIMARY input is never structurally absent by construction for an entire mission class. Today the gap is silent — nothing flags that a concluded mission left zero provenance.
evidence: migrate-operator-test-learnings.plan.md: investigation-only mission (73-scenario coverage audit, output docs/research/2026-07-operator-test-migration-coverage.md), no CR opened, no combat log, and zero ledger lines under any cr or shard — full mission lifecycle with no durable trace for the Scanner to read

sdd-aces-rejudge.plan.md: hand-run/reconciled mission also has no combat log file, and only escapes total silence because its 11 spec-gate approvals happened to be written straight to the ledger (seq 9-20) with rich why-narratives — an artifact of gate behavior, not a designed Scanner input

2 of the 3 missions reconciled-forward this retro (migrate-operator-test-learnings fully, sdd-aces-rejudge partially) lacked the PRIMARY combat-log input combat-log-governance defines the Scanner as reading; only github-34 (a live conductor run) produced one
project memory (hand-run/reconciled missions emit no combat log) already names this as a known lesson but no strategy/governance change has closed it
